Title: Valid Login
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid_username and valid_password.
2. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: User is authenticated and redirected to the profile page.

Title: Incorrect Password
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid_username and invalid_password.
2. Click the "Login" button.
Expected Result: The system displays an "Unauthorized" error message.

Title: Valid Signup
Test Steps:
1. Enter valid_email@example.com and valid_password.
2. Click the "Signup" button.
Expected Result: User is registered, and a confirmation email is sent.

Title: Invalid Email
Test Steps:
1. Enter invalid_email and valid_password.
2. Click the "Signup" button.
Expected Result: The system displays an "Invalid email" error message.

Title: Update Profile
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Enter new_username and new_profile_data.
3. Click the "Update Profile" button.
Expected Result: User's profile is updated with new_username and new_profile_data.

Title: Exit
Expected Result: User is logged out, and the system displays a confirmation message.

Title: Exit with Invalid Reason
Expected Result: The system displays an "Invalid exit reason" error message.
